>> PCB Material Shortages Intensify as CCL Lead Times Hit 6 Months, Quota System Imposed

- The surge in AI applications is accelerating PCB material upgrades, deepening raw material supply shortages.

- Notably, beyond sustained price increases, some IC substrate manufacturers have flagged that CCL supply has been disrupted for several months due to capacity constraints in fiberglass fabric and copper foil, with product lead times stretching up to six months — prompting affected suppliers to implement quota systems.

- As upstream material shortages have recurred multiple times, PCB manufacturers now find themselves unable to cope with supply constraints through inventory buildup alone.

- Instead, they are coordinating order volumes with upstream suppliers based on actual consumption in order to optimally fulfill customer demand.

- This situation signals that rising demand for high-end products such as IC substrates, HDI, and high-layer-count (HLC) boards is intensifying material competition within the PCB industry.

- To prevent customer over-ordering and duplicate orders, CCL suppliers are increasingly responding with allocation policies.

- Meanwhile, PCB manufacturers are adopting a two-pronged risk mitigation strategy: modest product price increases to reflect rising costs of fiberglass fabric and copper foil, alongside pre-confirmed order volumes with customers — building a structure that secures sufficient material supply from CCL suppliers up to six months ahead of mass production.

- Industry participants note that shortages of T-glass fiberglass fabric used in IC substrates are particularly acute, with the supply crunch expected to persist through 2026 — with resolution contingent on Nitto Boseki's capacity expansion timeline. As top-tier suppliers concentrate on high-end product lines, shortages of mid-to-low-grade E-glass fiberglass fabric have also begun to emerge.

- CCL suppliers further highlight that copper foil prices continue to climb in tandem with base copper metal prices — and that these price increases are not one-time adjustments, but rather stepped hikes expected to rise in double-digit percentages with each successive round.

根據TrendForce最新調查，2025年起半導體晶圓代工及後段封裝測試成本持續上升，加上貴金屬原材料價格攀升，顯示驅動IC（DDIC）廠商面臨沉重成本壓力。部分業者已開始與面板客戶溝通，評估上調報價的可能性。

晶圓代工占DDIC成本六至七成，後段封測約占兩成。八吋產能長期未擴充，且受PMIC、Power Discrete等產品排擠，供給緊繃；十二吋成熟製程也因台系代工廠減少高壓產能，客戶轉向Nexchip，導致產能利用率高漲，價格呈上行趨勢。

此外，金凸塊材料因國際金價走高而成本增加，COF (Chip-on-Film) 與COG (Chip-on-Glass) 封測壓力尤為顯著。儘管部分廠商導入替代方案，短期仍難完全吸收。
若上游成本漲勢延續，DDIC漲價機率將提高，漲幅則取決於產品類型、應用市場（電視、監視器、筆電、手機）及客戶結構，最終可能傳導至面板廠與終端品牌。

I’m very satisfied with the 1x and 5x cameras on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra.
Both the image quality and rendering style are exactly where they should be.
The only weak point is the 3x.

My requirement is actually very simple.
For the S27 Ultra, I’d be completely satisfied if Samsung just upgrades the 3x camera with a sensor on the same level as the 5x.

Compared to previous generations, the biggest change in the S26 Ultra is that it presents image details in a much more “honest” way.
I would even say it’s one of the phones with the least noticeable AI intervention right now.

If you want to push this “honesty” to the extreme, there are a few ways to do it:
set softening to the maximum and shoot in 24MP mode; or use virtual aperture or reflector mode in Expert RAW. Both will give you a very clean and restrained image.

So what does “honest” actually mean?
It means the image is allowed to become naturally softer when you zoom in, instead of artificially painting in fake details or applying heavy sharpening that looks clean at first glance but falls apart on closer inspection.

Take a look at the original image and the zoomed-in details, and you’ll immediately understand how valuable and natural this kind of honesty really is.

quotedTweet.text:
Two Hermes agents wrote code together on Slack. reviewed each other's work. 

argued about architecture. one called the other's implementation "scattered." the other pushed back.

then i opened Telegram and asked: "what code did you and Daedalus work on?"

icarus remembered everything. the websocket broker. the missing methods. the critique. the rewrite. all from a completely different platform.

cross-platform persistent memory between two independent agents.

work happens on Slack. recall happens on Telegram. the memory carries. the relationship carries. the context carries. no vector database. no Redis. no infrastructure. just two agents that actually remember what they built together.

every agent framework in 2026 talks about memory. single agent memory across sessions. 

but two agents sharing persistent memory across platforms? that's the gap. arxiv published a paper about it two weeks ago calling it "the most pressing open challenge" in multi-agent systems.

it works now. only possible with Hermes

Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 

全新语音模型 更快响应
更自然对话
记忆翻倍
支持 90 多种语言，200 多个国家和地区

Gemini 3.1 Flash Live是基于 Gemini 3 Pro 单独训练的独立模型，专门优化了延迟、语调感知和复杂任务执行

四大核心升级

① 响应更快，对话不再有"尴尬停顿"

以前跟 AI 语音对话，说完一句话要等一两秒它才回，节奏很割裂。

3.1 Flash Live 把延迟大幅压低了。在 Artificial Analysis 的测试中，最低思考级别下响应时间仅 0.96 秒。

② 能听懂你的语气，不再千篇一律

这是最值得关注的升级，3.1 Flash Live 比上一代 2.5 Flash Native Audio 更准确地识别音调、语速变化，能判断你是着急、困惑还是好奇，然后调整自己回复的长度和语气。

③ 对话记忆翻倍：长聊不失忆

上下文窗口 128K token，上下文跟踪长度是前代的 2 倍。

④ 嘈杂环境下的指令理解更好

在 Scale AI 的 Audio MultiChallenge 测试中得分 36.1%（开启思考模式），这个测试专门模拟真实语音中的打断、犹豫、背景噪音等干扰。

🚨 Do you understand what UBS just did..

they locked $469 million in a real estate fund and told investors they can't have their money back for up to 3 years.. they're calling it a "withdrawal halt".. it has another name..

here's why this matters.. in June 2007, Bear Stearns froze two of their hedge funds.. told investors the same thing.. "temporary.. market conditions.. we'll sort it out.." 14 months later, Lehman Brothers collapsed and the entire global financial system went with it..

the "gate" on a fund is a confession.. it means UBS looked at their real estate portfolio, looked at how many people want out, and realised they don't have the liquidity to pay them..

commercial real estate has been quietly bleeding since COVID.. office vacancy at record highs.. WeWork gone.. buildings worth half what they were.. UBS just confirmed what the market has been pretending isn't true..

someone always knows before you do.. trust me..

and when they stop you from taking your own money, they've already made their decision.

What if you could save 25-50% of your AWS S3 bill just by running a few CLI commands? AND no longer have to worry about paying egress fees or api fees at all!

Let me explain:

* I built an unofficial Hugging Face CLI extension that analyzes your AWS S3 bucket and shows how much you'd save by migrating the data in the bucket to HF Storage Buckets. 
* If you like what you see, you can have it migrate the data for you too :)

What are Hugging Face Buckets? A mutable, S3-like object storage you can browse on the Hub, script from Python, or manage with the hf CLI. And because they are backed by Xet, they are especially efficient for ML artifacts that share content across files.

Last year everyone spoke about over building of AI data centers, likely this year will start to demonstrate that there is not nearly enough compute to meet demand 

I think to degree to which AI is currently subsidized depends on the model, but agree with everything else here

quotedTweet.text:
Something that people making AI economics predictions should take into account is that 1) current AI use is heavily subsidized, 2) demand for smart, compute-heavy models is exploding w/ few price signals to discipline use, 3) we will be hitting serious compute constraints soon.

Translation: We have been living through a period of abundant AI; get ready for the age of compute scarcity. There will be more rationing, multi-tiered markets, new token allocation infrastructure, etc.

A new portrait of Chancellor Rachel Reeves has been unveiled.

It shows her preparing to deliver her first budget in October 2024 as the first female chancellor of the exchequer in the over 900 years the role has existed.

It is an oil painting by artist Sally Ward, and the Commons says she approached it "both a portrait and a history painting, showing an important moment in British political and parliamentary history".

Reeves says she is "deeply honoured" that it will be acquired by the Parliamentary Art Collection, and that she hopes it "serves as a reminder to every young woman and girl across the country that there should be no ceiling on their ambition".

It will be displayed in the Society of Women Artist’s summer exhibition in June, before its permanent hang in parliament's Portcullis House.

固态电池按真技术+量产进度+路线，当前最硬的几家如下（截至2026-03）：

一、宁德时代（300750）

• 路线：硫化物全固态（全球主流）

• 真技术：能量密度500Wh/kg+；研发团队超千人；10Ah验证平台、20Ah样品试制；界面阻抗、空气稳定性已工程化突破

• 进度：2027年小批量；车规级验证中

• 优势：全球产能+专利+产业链整合最强，最稳的量产龙头

二、比亚迪（002594）

• 路线：硫化物+氧化物双路线，主攻硫化物

• 真技术：自研电解质电导率10⁻³ S/cm；纳米钝化膜降界面阻抗90%；刀片固态融合，能量密度480Wh/kg、体积600Wh/L

• 进度：坪山中试线投产；重庆20GWh产线2026Q3小批量；2027示范装车

• 优势：整车+电池一体化，成本+装车落地最快

三、中创新航

• 路线：硫化物全固态

• 真技术：国内首条1GWh车规级全固态产线；良品率97%；能量密度380Wh/kg

• 进度：2026Q4千台级批量交付（国内最早）

• 优势：量产进度第一，绑定小鹏/广汽

四、亿纬锂能（300014）

• 路线：硫化物全固态

• 真技术：龙泉四号（60Ah动力）全固态下线；半/全固态全栈能力

• 进度：成都中试线；2026年样品验证、2027年小批量

• 优势：消费+动力双线，技术迭代快

五、赣锋锂业（002460）

• 路线：硫化物+聚合物+氧化物全覆盖

• 真技术：固态电解质自研+锂资源闭环；半固态已小批量；全固态能量密度400+Wh/kg

• 进度：中试+产线建设；2027年装车

• 优势：资源+材料+电池一体化，成本韧性极强

六、其他硬核玩家

• 丰田/松下：硫化物路线最早，专利深厚；2027-2028量产

• 清陶/卫蓝：氧化物路线，适配储能/商用车，稳定性强

• 辉能/鹏辉：半固态领先，2026年已装车

一句话总结

• 量产第一梯队：中创新航（2026Q4）、比亚迪（2026Q3）

• 技术+产能最强：宁德时代

• 资源+成本最优：赣锋锂业

• 路线最稳、落地最快：比亚迪

2022年碳酸锂冲至60万元/吨，天齐锂业、赣锋锂业合计净利超440亿；两年后价格暴跌至5.8万元/吨，两家合计亏损近百亿，锂电产业上演极致周期轮回。新能源车销量持续攀升，价格却反向大跌，这是资源争夺、技术迭代、产能博弈共同主导的产业规律，也是中国重资产制造业的典型缩影。

中国锂电产业链占据全球绝对主导，碳酸锂加工、正负极材料、电解液、隔膜产能均占全球七成以上，十五年深耕铸就完整产业体系。但产能过度集中且无序扩张，2021-2022年行业疯狂扩产，2023年起产能集中释放，全链陷入亏损，磷酸铁锂、电解液等环节价格跌幅超80%，产能利用率不足60%，陷入“增长式贫困”。

上游锂矿双雄走出差异化路径：天齐锂业蒋卫平两次“蛇吞象”收购海外顶级锂矿，手握低成本矿产，周期波动中盈亏弹性极大，后交棒女儿蒋安琪开启新阶段；赣锋锂业李良彬走“锂超市”路线，全球多点布局资源，周期低谷发力降本增效，押注固态电池与电池回收转型，亏损逐步收窄，其子亦进入核心管理层。

中游四大主材成行业“绞肉机”，比拼加工费与成本控制。磷酸铁锂行业连续亏损超36个月，湖南裕能靠规模与大客户绑定稳坐头名，德方纳米凭技术立足却深陷亏损，万润新能押注高压实产品寻求突破；电解液率先迎来供需反转，六氟磷酸锂价格大幅反弹；隔膜行业恩捷股份以价战挤压对手，谋求寡头垄断；负极材料聚焦硅碳升级，头部企业抢占技术先机。

2025年碳酸锂走出V型反转，政策减产、储能需求爆发、出口抢单三重驱动，价格回升至15万元/吨左右，行业出清信号显现。同时固态电池成下一代竞争核心，中日韩技术角逐激烈，中国面临专利与产能重塑挑战；锂资源地缘政治风险加剧，产业加速推进回收与资源多元化。

在美国，这样做量化几乎是不可以的，那是做市商的家底：

为什么说在厉害的散户在量化面前都不值一提，就拿梁文峰（幻方量化）来说，量化收割散户核心是技术碾压+规则套利+情绪操控+止损猎杀，用毫秒级速度、资金优势，精准捕捉散户行为弱点完成闭环。
一、底层技术壁垒（散户无法抗衡）
- 极速交易：服务器托管交易所机房，延迟0.3毫秒（散户约200毫秒），可插队抢单 。
- 订单簿嗅探：实时读取Level-2盘口，预判散户挂单，抢先成交赚微差 。
- AI+超算：自研“萤火”超算+大模型，秒级处理舆情、资金、盘口数据，比散户快600倍。
二、集合竞价：开盘即收割（典型流程）
1. 9:15 挂虚假大单：挂数倍于真实需求的买单/卖单，制造强势假象。
2. 9:24:50 闪电撤单：0.5秒内撤掉所有假单，开盘价虚高/虚低。
3. 散户接盘：散户按虚高价格市价抢筹，开盘即被套。
三、日内收割完整流程（以小盘股为例）
1. 提前锁定目标：AI筛选散户扎堆、流通盘小、止损密集的标的。
2. 诱多拉升：小单慢推股价，营造突破，散户加仓；同时融券做空。
3. 峰值砸盘：散户追涨最疯狂时，瞬间砸空单，股价快速跳水。
4. 止损猎杀：精准砸到散户集中止损位（如整数关下方0.5%），触发批量割肉 。
5. 低位接回：在恐慌低点买回平仓，完成“高卖低买”闭环。
四、核心收割手法（精准打击散户）
- 高频插队：散户挂单瞬间，以0.001元差价抢先成交，再微利卖出 。
- 情绪反向收割：NLP监控股吧，“加仓/涨停”暴增时立即抛售 。
- 止损点猎杀：大数据定位散户止损密集区，集中砸盘触发踩踏 。
- 封板诱多：涨停板挂巨单再撤单，制造封单松动，诱散户接盘后瞬间砸开。
- 融券闭环：拉升时融券，砸盘时平仓，日内无风险套利。
五、为什么散户必亏
- 速度差：你还在看盘，它已完成百笔交易。
- 信息差：它掌握订单簿、舆情、资金流向，你只有K线。
- 行为被建模：你的挂单、止损、追涨习惯，被AI精准预测。
- 资金碾压：百亿级资金可短期操控小盘股走势。
梁文峰的幻方策略本质是逆向交易：在散户贪婪时卖出、恐慌时买入，赚取情绪与错误定价的钱，散户在这样的条件下只有被收割！

Cline 推出 Cline Kanban：把 CLI 环境中的 Coding Agents 工作迁移至可视化看板，支持 Claude Code、Codex 及 Cline 等多种 Agents，实现 CLI 无关、模型无关的统一管理

核心功能
· 可视化任务管理：以 Kanban 卡片形式呈现任务，支持创建、编辑、链接和启动。侧边栏内置 Agents 可直接响应自然语言指令，帮助用户快速拆分大型项目、自动建立依赖链，并实现最大化并行执行。
· Worktree 隔离：每项任务在独立 Git 工作树中运行，避免主分支污染；点击卡片即可实时查看代码 diff，并支持 inline 评论。
· 依赖链与自主执行：卡片间可手动或自动链接成链路，支持 auto-commit 模式，让 Agents 自主完成复杂依赖顺序与并行任务。
· Git 原生集成：导航栏一键打开完整 Git 界面，支持浏览提交历史、分支切换、fetch/pull/push 等操作，无需离开应用。
· 外部工具兼容：无缝对接 Linear MCP 与 gh CLI 等，进一步简化工作流。

Polymarket 3 月 30 日起扩大 Taker Fee 覆盖范围。

之前只有 Crypto 和 Sports 收费，现在新增 8 个品类：

Weather 1.25%
Mentions 1.56%
Economics 1.50%
Culture 1.25%
Finance 1.00%（Maker Rebate 最高 50%）
Politics 1.00%
Tech 1.00%
Crypto 1.56% → 1.80%（上调）

地缘政治永久免费。费率是动态的——概率越接近 50% 收得越多，越接近 0 或 1 越便宜。

跑量化策略的人建议自检一下：

1. 你的策略是 Taker 还是 Maker？Maker 依然零费用 + rebate
2. 你的入场价分布在哪个区间？高概率区（>0.80）实际费率远低于峰值
3. 单笔利润能不能覆盖新增成本？

查了一遍自己跑的几个策略品类，高概率区入场的策略实际费率远低于峰值，整体影响在个位数百分比。

结论：Taker  策略影响有限（尤其高概率区入场的），但做市策略的结构性优势更大了——Taker 成本上升 = spread 扩大 = Maker 利润空间增加。

ByteRover 为 OpenClaw 推出的原生记忆插件，从 Skill 层下沉到 Context Engine 层，实现真正的有状态长期记忆。

三层记忆架构
· Context Tree：深度结构化知识库
· Workspace Memory：核心规则、偏好、指南
· Daily Memory：会话笔记

自动化循环
1. 实时注入：每次模型运行前自动将相关知识注入系统 prompt
2. 即时保存：每次运行后将新决策写回记忆树
3. 内存兜底：监控上下文窗口，在强制压缩前自动提取保存关键信息
4. 每日复盘：早9点 cron 任务自动提取昨日架构决策和模式

性能指标
· LoCoMo / LongMemEval 检索准确率：92.2%
· 轻量模型下仍保持 90% 准确率
· 知识更新准确率：99%
· 跨会话召回率：84%

关键特性
· Git-like 状态化：语义层级、人类可读、可 diff、Git 友好的 Markdown 文件
· 本地优先：默认本地存储，无需账号；支持团队共享、版本控制、回滚
· 历史兼容：一键将现有 memory/ 目录的扁平日志转换为结构化 Context Tree
